column1: # This manifest lists source data files to ingest into GIGANTIC.
#   genome_path      - Path to genome FASTA file (or NA if not available)
#   genome_annotation_path         - Path to GFF3/GTF annotation file (or NA if not available)
#   proteome_path    - Path to proteome amino acid file (or NA if not available)
#   genome_source_identifier - "genome" joined with source database + assembly ID (e.g., genome_ncbi_GCF_000001405.40, genome_figshare_12345)
# SEQUENCE HEADER CONVENTION (REQUIRED for proteome .aa files)
#   - Paths can be absolute or relative to this workflow directory
#   - Use "NA" for data types not available for a species
#   - Species names must use underscores (Genus_species), not spaces
# HEADER ROW (required, must be exactly these 4 column names)
# EXAMPLE DATA (uncomment and edit with your data)
# All three data types available (using relative paths to project-level INPUT_user):
